turns.name: WARREN E. BURGER
turns.text: I have the Court’s opinion and judgment to announce in number 72-922, Paschall against Christie-Stewart Incorporated. For reasons stated in an opinion filed this morning, the judgment of the Supreme Court of Oklahoma is vacated and remanded for a further consideration. Also, I have to state that Mr. Justice Douglas, with whom Mr. Justice Stewart joins, filed a dissenting opinion.
